failedAssertions.reason: Import completion returned to first-time Welcome without saving/importing profile state, so end-to-end import-to-dashboard (or saved-profile welcome) contract was not met.
Onboarding completion does not land on dashboard and does not show an onboarded returning-profile state on Welcome.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for agent-browser isolation boundaries and constraints.
Added welcome-entry flow notes for deterministic onboarding failure-path testing and network-capture caveat.
